quarantine.note: Cited block p003_c0009 only reads 'Preliminary Report: Fall 2019' and does not mention the TTP Pilot Project or any project at all. The connection to project_14th-street-transit-truck-priority-pilot is inferred from document context (the document is about the TTP Pilot), but the block text itself does not state the relation. Co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.
